title: Daily Briefing: Imagine you're a Trump trial juror
shortDescription: You'd have some decisions to make this week. Here's the news to know on Wednesday.

title: Why was Biden barred from the Ohio ballot?
shortDescription: The DNC's plan to ensure Biden’s name will appear on the presidential ballot in Ohio come November.

title: What are most interesting down-ballot races in the country this fall?
shortDescription: A look at some of the more competitive down-ballot races across the U.S.

title: Trump endorses VA. Rep. Bob Good's opponent despite trial support
shortDescription: Rep. Bob Good, R-Va., first endorsed Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis before backing Donald Trump. Good appeared at the Trump trial, but was not endorsed.

title: The possible verdict outcomes of Trump's trial
shortDescription: Donald Trump's first criminal trial is coming to a close. These are the verdict outcomes the jury could reach in the New York hush money trial.

title: Robert De Niro speaks outside Trump trial
shortDescription: Actor Robert De Niro made a surprise appearance outside Donald Trump's hush money trial to show support for President Joe Biden.

title: OnPolitics: Closing arguments begin in Trump's hush money trial
shortDescription: Trump faces 34 felony counts of falsifying business records in order to conceal or commit another crime.

title: Democrats to nominate Joe Biden before DNC to meet Ohio deadline
shortDescription: The Democratic National Committee will hold a virtual roll call ahead of its Aug. 19 convention and before Ohio's Aug. 7 deadline to certify ballot.

title: Donald Trump's children attend hush money trial
shortDescription: Donald Trump's sons Donald Jr. and Eric, daughter Tiffany and daughter-in-law Lara attended closing arguments of his hush money trial.

title: Judge rejects prosecution gag request in Trump's classified docs case
shortDescription: The judge in former President Donald Trump's classified documents case rejected a prosecution request to prohibit him from commenting on FBI agents.

title: When is the 2024 election?
shortDescription: With summer election season heating up, it’s difficult to escape the bombardment of political discourse. But when is the election?

title: Historic Trump hush money trial reaches climax | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: The implications of Ireland, Norway and Spain decisions to recognize Palestine as a state. Financial aid experts raise new concerns about FAFSA.

title: Trump on Trial: Gaming out a guilty verdict
shortDescription: A guilty verdict could make Donald Trump a more disciplined presidential canditate.

title: 2 officers who defended the Capitol on Jan. 6 coming to AZ
shortDescription: Jan. 6 veterans Aquilino Gonell and Harry Dunn are campaigning in Arizona on behalf of President Joe Biden's reelection campaign.

title: Trump hush money trial recap: both sides close after volatile 6 weeks
shortDescription: Donald Trump's historic criminal trial, the first-ever for an ex-president, wrapped up Tuesday with closing arguments. Next up: jury deliberations.

title: Historic Trump criminal trial reaches critical day: closing arguments
shortDescription: Here's what to expect on a critical day in former President Donald Trump's criminal hush money trial, as both sides deliver closing arguments.

title: Biden honors fallen soldiers for Memorial Day
shortDescription: President Joe Biden was joined by Vice President Kamala Harris at Arlington National Cemetery to honor the fallen soldiers who perished in battle.

title: Memory can 'reopen that black hole': Biden says at Memorial Day tribute
shortDescription: The president said while his son did not perish on the battlefield, it was a consequence of being in the army and working next to a burnfield.

title: Gen Z candidate will face off against indicted Trump fake elector
shortDescription: Ashwin Ramaswami, who has worked in the election security industry, is running for political office in Georgia against someone who was a fake elector for Trump.
